message:
perf(bench): increase warmup to 10 tokens for more accurate measurement

With 5 warmup tokens, measured phase includes tokens 6-8 which still
need I/O for cache population. Increasing to 10 warmup tokens ensures
measured tokens are fully cache-warm.

Victory Lap results (50 tokens):
- SOL ceiling: 2.23 TPS (decreases from 3.1 with seq length growth)
- Normal mode: 0.72 TPS avg, 340ms min (near SOL when cache hits)
- 70x speedup over baseline (0.02 TPS → 1.4+ TPS short runs)
